REIS IA PATTERNS DESIGN SYSTEM v1.0

Pattern Library

Reusable compositions that combine tokens, components, and effects into consistent UI patterns. Each pattern includes a live demo, usage guidance, and implementation code.

[01] Card Patterns

Three card tiers for different emphasis levels. Standard for content, accented for featured items, and rotating border for highest emphasis (max 1-2 per page).

Standard Card

Default Content Card

Surface-2 background with 8% white border. Hover shifts to Surface-3 with 12% border.

Learn more
Accented Card

Featured Content Card

2px blue top border signals featured status. Same hover behavior as standard.

Learn more
Rotating Border

Highest Emphasis Card

Sapphire Scanner effect. Reserved for pillar cards or featured case studies. Max 1-2 per page.

Learn more

Glass Card

Glass Card

blur(16px) + saturate(180%) + 5% white background. Used for stats overlays and content that sits above imagery.

Card Patterns CSS
/* Standard card hover */
.card {
  background: var(--surface-2);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 32px;
  transition: border-color 300ms var(--ease-base),
              background-color 300ms var(--ease-base);
}
.card:hover {
  border-color: var(--border-visible);
  background-color: var(--surface-3);
}

/* Accented card */
.card-accented {
  border-top: 2px solid var(--accent-blue);
}

/* Glass card */
.card-glass {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: 16px;
  backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(180%);
}
[02] Section Layout Patterns

Sections alternate between Surface-0 and Surface-1. Gradient dividers provide smooth transitions. Padding uses fluid spacing tokens for responsive behavior.

Hero Section — Surface-0

Padding: var(--space-3xl) top, var(--space-2xl) bottom

Content Section — Surface-1

Padding: var(--space-3xl) vertical

Feature Section — Surface-0

Padding: var(--space-3xl) vertical

CTA Section — Surface-1

Padding: var(--space-3xl) vertical

Section Pattern HTML
<section style="background: var(--surface-0);">
  <div class="container-standard"
       style="padding-top: var(--space-3xl);
              padding-bottom: var(--space-3xl);">
    <SectionLabel number="01" title="Section Title" />
    <!-- Content here -->
  </div>
</section>

<div class="gradient-divider"></div>

<section style="background: var(--surface-1);">
  <!-- Next section content -->
</section>
[03] Grid Patterns

Grid patterns using the hairline technique (1px gap with parent background color as dividers) and standard responsive column layouts.

Hairline Grid

01

Grid cell with 1px hairline dividers. Background of parent shows through the gaps.

02

Grid cell with 1px hairline dividers. Background of parent shows through the gaps.

03

Grid cell with 1px hairline dividers. Background of parent shows through the gaps.

04

Grid cell with 1px hairline dividers. Background of parent shows through the gaps.

05

Grid cell with 1px hairline dividers. Background of parent shows through the gaps.

06

Grid cell with 1px hairline dividers. Background of parent shows through the gaps.

Responsive Column Layouts

2-Column (6+6)
Column 1
Column 2
3-Column (4+4+4)
Column 1
Column 2
Column 3
4-Column (3+3+3+3)
Column 1
Column 2
Column 3
Column 4
Hairline Grid CSS
.grid-hairline {
  display: grid;
  gap: 1px;
  background: var(--border-default);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
}

.grid-hairline > * {
  background: var(--surface-0);
}

/* On Surface-1 sections */
.grid-hairline-s1 > * {
  background: var(--surface-1);
}

.grid-hairline-2 { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
.grid-hairline-3 { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
.grid-hairline-4 { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }
[04] CTA Patterns

All conversion paths lead to /agendar (booking) or /aplicar (application). The blue accent exists primarily for CTA elements — max 2 accent-colored elements per viewport.

Hero CTA Pattern (Dual Button)

Ready to Transform Your Business?

Book a strategy call to explore how AI systems can multiply your revenue.

Agendar Reuniao Aplicar
Ghost CTA (In-Card) Explore case studies
[05] Badge Patterns

5 badge variants for semantic labeling. Each uses its own color token for background, border, and text.

Accent Success Warning Error Neutral
AI IMPLEMENTATION

Feature labels, technology tags

COMPLETED

Status indicators, confirmations

BETA

Early access, experimental features

DEPRECATED

Removed features, breaking changes

V1.0

Version numbers, metadata

Badge CSS
.badge-accent {
  background: rgba(74, 144, 255, 0.10);
  border: 1px solid rgba(74, 144, 255, 0.20);
  color: #4A90FF;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 6px 14px;
  border-radius: 6px;
}

.badge-success {
  background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.10);
  border: 1px solid rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.20);
  color: #22C55E;
}

.badge-warning {
  background: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.10);
  border: 1px solid rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.20);
  color: #F59E0B;
}

.badge-error {
  background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.10);
  border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.20);
  color: #EF4444;
}

.badge-neutral {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.70);
}
[06] Form Patterns

Form inputs with consistent states: default, hover, focus, error, success, and disabled. All inputs use Surface-3 background on Surface-0/1 sections.

As it appears on your business card.
Focus state: blue border + 15% blue ring.
Please enter a valid URL.
Auto-generated. Cannot be edited.
Form Input CSS
.input {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: 48px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  font-size: 16px;
  color: var(--text-primary);
  background: var(--surface-3);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
  border-radius: 8px;
  transition: border-color 200ms, box-shadow 200ms;
}

.input:focus {
  border-color: var(--accent-blue);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(74, 144, 255, 0.15);
}

.input-error {
  border-color: var(--color-error);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15);
}
[07] Divider Patterns

Sections use gradient fade dividers rather than hard borders. The gradient fades from transparent at the edges to the border color in the middle.

Gradient Divider (Primary)
.gradient-divider
Solid Border (Subtle)
border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default)
Accent Divider
background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--accent-blue), transparent)
[08] Usage Rules
Do
  • Use standard cards for most content; reserve accented/rotating for emphasis
  • Alternate sections between Surface-0 and Surface-1
  • Use gradient dividers between sections for smooth transitions
  • Keep max 2 blue accent CTA elements per viewport
  • All CTAs lead to /agendar or /aplicar
Don't
  • Put more than 2 rotating border cards on a single page
  • Use hard 1px borders between sections (use gradient dividers)
  • Create pricing tables or tier comparison patterns
  • Mix badge semantic colors (e.g., green badge for errors)
  • Use form inputs without labels — accessibility requirement
REIS IA

Design System v1.0 — the single source of truth for the Reis IA brand identity, tokens, components, and patterns.
